defaults.hook_text: THE FREE KICK THAT SHOULDN'T BE POSSIBLE
defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Lionel Messi's face celebrating intensely in a Barcelona or Argentina jersey, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Why Lionel Messi's free kicks are nearly impossible to stop - he tells the keeper where it is going and still scores in the top corner
videos.video_script: Goalkeepers know exactly where he is going to put it, and they still cannot stop it. Lionel Messi has scored more free kicks than almost any player alive. He stands over the ball, picks the tiny gap beside the post, and bends it perfectly out of reach. Keepers build a wall, guess early, dive the right way, and the ball still kisses the top corner. The way it curves looks like it should not even be allowed. The free kick that shouldn't be possible. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Lionel Messi free kick top corner, Lionel Messi free kick goal slow motion, Lionel Messi free kick celebration, Lionel Messi in a blue and red Barcelona jersey, Lionel Messi Argentina free kick goal, Lionel Messi standing over a free kick, Lionel Messi curling shot top corner, Lionel Messi best free kicks, Lionel Messi goal celebration close up, Lionel Messi close up face
